title: Tactile living-world and support phase
summary: Lane 4 should now make living-world state change how an outing feels in practice, then either sharpen or simplify the support row so helper choice is meaningfully different.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the tactile living-world route handoff.
execution_order.why_now: Day-part, weather, phenology, and process windows should start mattering to play, not just copy.
One route should feel different because clues, emphasis, or opportunity change in the world.
The new behavior should deepen replay, not create opaque gating.

execution_order.goal: Repair the zone-safe wrack opportunity seam.
execution_order.why_now: The living-world route change should only widen the intended tide-line clue, not allow a boundary clue from the prior zone.

execution_order.goal: Review the zone-safe wrack opportunity repair.
execution_order.why_now: The fix should preserve the softer replay feel without reintroducing opaque gating or wrong-zone matches.
The helper row should either create real differences or stay deliberately tiny.
Flavor-only helper choices are the weakest middle ground.
The support row should feel sharper without becoming loadout sprawl.

guardrails: No new inventory, quest log, or shell layer.
Prefer clue prominence, route emphasis, and in-world feel over hard gating.
If a helper still does not create a felt difference, simplify instead of expanding.

main_260_focus.copy_goal: turn Wrack Shelter from a replay-title variant into a soft live-window opportunity by letting one tide-line wrack clue count through the active process seam
guardrails: Keep bull-kelp-wrack valid in and out of the live window.
Only widen the final wrack-line stage; leave dune-grass and lee-cover unchanged.
Keep notebook-ready and filed states canonically Shore Shelter.
Do not make pacific-sand-crab a valid route clue in this pass.

main_261_focus.copy_goal: make route-marker feel like guidance instead of a decorative pin by snapping world-map focus to the active outing target when that support is selected
implementation_shape: When route-marker is selected and an active outing target exists, opening the world map from play should focus that target instead of the current biome.
When route-marker is selected while the field station overlays an open world map, closing the station should return to the map already focused on the outing target.
Reuse the existing route pin and Today/footer copy instead of adding new map chrome.
guardrails: Do not add path overlays, another map chip, or another support row.
Do not change support unlock order or save shape.
Keep hand-lens, note-tabs, and place-tab behavior unchanged.
